description: Build a collaborative filtering recommender system using the MovieLens 100k dataset (https://files.grouplens.org/datasets/movielens/ml-100k.zip) and the recommenderlab package. The system must generate a summary of the realRatingMatrix (derived from u.data) at /home/ga/RProjects/output/matrix_summary.csv, a histogram of normalized ratings at /home/ga/RProjects/output/rating_distribution.png, and a performance evaluation (RMSE and MAE) comparing UBCF and IBCF models using an 80/20 data split at /home/ga/RProjects/output/model_evaluation.csv. Produce a list of the Top 10 movie recommendations for User 42 using a UBCF model trained on the full dataset, including movie titles from u.item, and save the output to /home/ga/RProjects/output/user_42_recommendations.csv. Write all R code in /home/ga/RProjects/movielens_recommender.R. Login: username=ga, password=password123. RStudio is open with a starter script.
